name: notification_tool
description: Send a real-time browser notification to the operator. Use this to surface important findings, request attention, or signal a handoff without waiting for job completion. Notifications appear as browser toasts and are logged in the event feed. Severity levels: info (teal), warning (amber), error (red), success (green).

title.description: Short notification title displayed in bold (max 80 chars).

message.description: Body text of the notification (max 300 chars).

severity.description: Visual severity level of the notification.

session_id.description: Optional session ID for log correlation.
